title: Bhodi v1: Production-ready RAG framework with clean hexagonal architecture
objective: Describe the intended user-visible or governance outcome.
scope: List what this change touches and what it intentionally leaves out.
summary: Explain the motivation, expected result, and why now.
acceptance_criteria: Describe measurable completion criteria in plain English.
tests_expected: List the local or CI checks that must pass before closure.
rollback_plan: Describe the safest fallback if validation or rollout fails.
deploy_plan: Describe rollout expectations, sequencing, or state if no deploy is needed.
threat_model: Document security-sensitive assumptions when risk_tier is T2-high.
